committedAssetStrategy.summary: The committed geometry is hand-authored, normalized, stylized overlay data created for this app. It does not copy external GIS coordinates, so it can remain bundled in a public static app while future official data preprocessing is evaluated.
committedAssetStrategy.licenseTreatment: Project-owned stylized data; external sources below are documented as verified source candidates/provenance strategy, not copied geometry.
committedAssetStrategy.accuracyNotice: Decorative navigation art only. Do not use for legal, survey, routing, cadastral, emergency, or address decisions.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: Natural Earth Admin 0 Boundary Lines / Countries
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Natural Earth describes its vector/raster map data as public domain.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Acceptable future source for lightweight world/country outlines if a later worker preprocesses and attributes the static asset.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Use low-scale 1:110m or simplified derived linework for subtle non-pickable globe borders; avoid making disputed-boundary political claims beyond the source's de facto view.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: Bundled Natural Earth 110m Admin 0 country border lines
verifiedSourceCandidates.publisher: Natural Earth / nvkelso natural-earth-vector GitHub mirror
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Natural Earth describes its map data as public domain. The bundled asset extracts low-resolution line coordinates for decorative globe borders.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Committed for G002 as static, non-live, decorative country border data.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Render as non-pickable GlobeRenderer-owned line geometry; do not use for political/legal boundary claims.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 SHP
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Public-data portal entry is free and intended for legal administrative-boundary information; confirm the displayed 이용허락범위 at download time before committing derived geometry.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Preferred future source for current Korea legal-boundary preprocessing when an execution lane can download, simplify, and document the snapshot.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Use build-time preprocessing only; do not call portal/VWorld APIs from the client at runtime.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: 법정구역경계_시군구 / 행정안전부 legal-boundary feeds
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Public-data portal legal-boundary feed candidate; verify the active 이용허락범위 and attribution requirements at retrieval time.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Acceptable future source candidate for gu-level Korea overlay if processed into static bundled data.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: No live client API usage; cache a bounded simplified snapshot with provenance.

verifiedSourceCandidates.name: southkorea/southkorea-maps
verifiedSourceCandidates.licenseSummary: Repository documents open map formats and source provenance; current repo state should be checked for license/source freshness before copying geometry.
verifiedSourceCandidates.permittedUseDecision: Fallback reference only if official feed preprocessing blocks execution and licensing/freshness is explicitly accepted.
verifiedSourceCandidates.implementationNote: Do not copy GADM-derived files from this or any other source for the public app.

excludedSources.reason: Avoid for this redistributed public/static gift app because common GADM terms restrict commercial redistribution and derivatives.
Avoid NC/ND census-boundary data when simplification/modification or public redistribution is required.
Violates the static/no-live-API requirement and adds runtime dependency risk.

attributionText: Korea family overlay geometry in this repository is hand-authored/stylized for decorative navigation. Future boundary preprocessing may use Natural Earth public-domain country boundaries and Korean public-data legal-boundary feeds with snapshot-specific attribution.
